name: dockerfile-dep-pin
description: TRIGGER CONDITIONS: Pinning unpinned pip dependencies in a Dockerfile builder stage. Use when: (1) a pip install line in a Dockerfile lacks a version specifier, (2) you want to match the version from pyproject.toml [build-system].requires or a lockfile, (3) you need a regression test to prevent future un-pinning, (4) stabilizing Docker layer cache by removing implicit version resolution.
